doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The California State Bar has no "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" and cannot authorize paralegals to perform legal tasks that constitute practice of law through such a document.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar does not have an "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP-2025," the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission does not issue practice-authorization protocols of this nature, and the document creates a non-existent exception to unauthorized practice of law rules that would require formal rule changes through the California Supreme Court.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar has no "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" and cannot authorize paralegals to perform legal tasks that constitute practice of law through such a document.
